problems.diagnostic: TCP.manoeuvre_command (entity reference)  and OCF.nominal_orbit (entity reference)  do not have compatible types
problems.cause: Type mismatch between TCP.manoeuvre_command and OCF.nominal_orbit in connection Cnx4
problems.minimal_edit: Change the connection Cnx4 to connect TCP.manoeuvre_command to a compatible port on OCF, or restructure the model to ensure type compatibility

executor_steps: Identify the correct port on OCF that should receive manoeuvre_command from TCP
Modify the connection Cnx4 in AOCSprocessing.others to use the correct port name
Verify that the new connection maintains the intended data flow and type compatibility
